title: Give access to the Project Portfolio feature to Pro Users
excerpt: We pay a lot.  We don’t have enterprises yet.  We are trying.  Give us the premium tools we pay for.  It’s that simple.

posts.author: Usernamegame (Jake N)
posts.cookedHtml: We pay a lot. We don’t have enterprises yet. We are trying. Give us the premium tools we pay for. It’s that simple.

posts.author: Bobby.Trick (Bobby Trick)
posts.cookedHtml: Before actually launching project portfolio it was available in the beta for pro users and the pre-release documentation specifically mentioned that pro users would get it. it truly was disappointing to have that carrot dangled and then taken away at the last moment.
